The Problem

You're Losing Deals
to Your Own Tools

Most agents don't have a CRM problem. They have a systems problem.

01 — Tool Overload

6 Apps. 6 Logins.
Zero Integration.

One app for contacts. Another for email. Another for graphics. Another for social. A spreadsheet for showings. Every tool is a silo — and leads slip through the cracks between them.

02 — Speed Kills

Follow-Ups
Never Happen

You mean to call back. You mean to send that listing. But you're showing homes all day, and by the time you sit down, 47 other agents already did.

03 — Silent Sphere

Your Sphere Forgets
You Exist

Past clients are your best source of referrals. But without automated touchpoints — home anniversaries, check-ins, market updates — they call whoever's top of mind.

What Makes Us Different

Three Things No Other
CRM Can Do.

Every feature below is an industry first. They're the reason agents switch — and never go back.

Nova works alongside your team — managing contacts, follow-ups, and listings while you focus on closing deals.
Nova

Meet Nova
Your 24/7 Growth Partner

Nova lives inside every part of the platform. Write follow-ups in seconds, generate listing captions, get lead score predictions, and receive next-step recommendations — all without leaving the CRM.

  • ✓Nova follow-up — personalized to each contact's history
  • ✓Listing description & Instagram caption generator
  • ✓Conversation summarizer — 6 months in 3 sentences
  • ✓Lead score prediction — know who's closing next
  • ✓Objection handler — 3 scripts for any pushback
  • ✓Market report writer with local MLS data
You
Write a follow-up text for the Chen family — we toured 3 homes last Tuesday and they loved the one on Maple Street.
AI
AI
"Hi Sarah & James! 👋 Loved showing you those homes on Tuesday — especially the Maple St. one. The backyard and open kitchen checked so many of your boxes. Wanted to see if any questions came up since then? Happy to run some comparable sales numbers if that helps you feel good about the price. Talk soon! — [Your name]"
✓ Use This ↻ Regenerate
Content Engine

Never Wonder What
to Post Again

The only real estate CRM with a built-in social media system. Weekly content prompts, Nova caption generation, reel scripts, and a full post scheduler — replacing Buffer, Canva, and Jasper in one tool.

  • ✓Weekly reel ideas, market update prompts, buyer & seller tips
  • ✓Nova writes 3 caption variations per post, every time
  • ✓Reel script writer with hook, 3 key points, and CTA
  • ✓Visual content calendar with scheduling across platforms
  • ✓Replaces Buffer ($18) + Jasper ($49) + other tools

Market Update Reel
Today's AI Caption

"Inventory is still tight in the North Shore — but that doesn't mean deals aren't happening. Here's what smart buyers are doing right now to win in this market 🏡 #RealEstate #BuyerTips #ChicagoHomes"

Industry First

AI Showing Route Planner

Plan your client’s showing day in seconds. Add properties, get real drive times between stops, and send a branded itinerary via email, text, or WhatsApp. Nova auto-fills property details and suggests the optimal route order.

  • ✓Address autocomplete with instant property lookup
  • ✓Real drive times between each stop (OSRM routing)
  • ✓Nova auto-fills price, beds, and neighbourhood highlights
  • ✓Client feedback buttons: Loved it / Maybe / Pass
  • ✓Save routes, share via email/SMS/WhatsApp
  • ✓Nova drafts the client message in your chosen channel

Just a quick note to confirm I've received your signed disclosure for 42 Oak Lane. Everything looks great and has been filed with your deal documents.

We're right on schedule for your May 12th closing. I'll be in touch this week with the next steps on the final walkthrough.

Thanks for being so responsive — it makes all the difference!

Just Getting Started?

Built for Day One.
Not Day 1,000.

Most CRMs assume you already have 500 contacts and 10 active listings. SphereFlow assumes you have zero — and helps you build from there.

From your very first listing to your hundredth — Nova runs your business while you're showing homes.
01

Nova Tells You What to Do

No more guessing. Nova gives you a daily briefing with exactly who to call, what to post, and which leads to follow up with — even when your database is small.

02

Your First Listing, Marketed Like a Pro

Get your first listing? Nova generates an MLS description, Instagram caption, reel script, YouTube title, email blast, and ad copy — in 10 seconds. You look like a 10-year vet.

03

Build Your Sphere from Scratch

Import your phone contacts. Nova identifies who's most likely to buy or sell, drafts your first outreach messages, and starts tracking relationships from day one.

04

Every Tool, One Login, One Price

Skip the "which tools do I need" research. CRM, email, social scheduling, AI copywriting, showing planner, funnels — it's all here. Start with one subscription instead of six.

The SphereFlow Edge

What No Other CRM
Will Do for You

New agent or top producer — these are the tools that give you an unfair advantage from day one.

This is what an AI Growth Operator looks like. Nova doesn't assist — she runs the operation.
01 — Anniversary Engine

Home Anniversary
Automation

A personalized message every year on the purchase date. The most powerful relationship touchpoint in real estate — and most agents miss it entirely.

02 — Revenue Tracking

Referral Engine with
Revenue Attribution

See exactly who sends you business, what it's worth, and when to ask for more. Turn your best clients into your best salespeople.

03 — AI Operator

Nova AI
Follow-Up

The number one thing agents procrastinate on — writing follow-ups — solved in 2 seconds. Personalized, contextual, and ready to send.

04 — Route Planning

Showing Day
Planner

Plan showing routes with real drive times, auto-fill property details, and send branded itineraries to clients. No other CRM does this.

Real-time monitoring. Proactive follow-ups. Nova never sleeps — so your pipeline never stalls.
